titleStmt.title: SII 7.773: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 773. (A.R. No. 149 of 1902). ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE SAME SHRINE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pūmālai miṭaintu poṉmālai tikaḻtarap pāmālai malinta parumaṇittiraḷpuyat tirunilamaṭantaiyoṭu jayamaka ḷiruppat taṉ varaimārvan taṉateṉap peṟṟut tirumaka(ḷ) ḷorutani yiruppak kalaimakaḷ coṟṟiṟam puṇarnta kaṟpiṉaḷāki viruppoṭu ṉāvaka
t tiruppa ticaitoṟum tikiriyoṭu ceṅkol naṭappa Aki(l)lapuvanamum kavippator putumatipola veṇkuṭai mimicai niṟpa karuṅkali Oḷittu vanpilattiṭaik kiṭappa kuḷattiṭait teluṅkavīmaṉ vilaṅkalmimicai yeṟavum kaliṅkapūmiyai kana(l)
leri parukavum Aimpaṭaipparuvattu vempaṭai tāṅkiyum veṅkaimaṇṭalam tāṅkiṉitiruntu vaṭaticai yaṭippaṭuttaruḷi teṉṟicai tarumamamRead tarumamum.tavamum tānamum taḻaippa vetamum meymaiyu mātiyukampolat talaittalai ciṟappa vantaruḷi velaṟkarum po
rppuliyāṇai pārttivar cūṭa niṟaimaṇimakuṭam muṟaimaiyiṟ cūṭi maṉṉuyiṟ kellām miṉṉuyir tāypoṟ ṟaṇ(ṉ)oḷi parappit taṉittani parattu maṇmuḻutu kaḷippa maṉuneṟi vaḷarttu taṉkoyiṟ koṟṟavācaṟpuṟattu maṇi nāvoṭuṅka muracukaḷ muḻaṅka
vijaiyamum pukaḻum meṉme loṅka vāḻivāḻi mānilaṅ kākka(ka)t tirumaṇi poṟṟeṭṭeḻutu pattāṇṭu varumuṟai muṉne maṉṉavar cumantu tiṟai niraittuk kuvitta cempoṟ kuvaiyāl tan kulanāyakaṉ tāṇṭa(v)em puriyum cempoṉ
Ampalañ cūḻ tirumāḷikaiyum kopuravācalil kūṭakacālamum Ulaku valaṅkoṇ ṭoḷiviḷaṅku nemi kulavarai Utaiyakuṉṟamoṭu niṉṟeṉap pacumpoṉ meyntu palivaḷar pīṭamum vicumpoḷit taḻaippa viḷaṅku poṉmeyntu Irunilan taḻaippa Imai
yavar kaḷippap periya tirunāḷ perumper viḻāveṉum Uyar puraṭṭāti Uttiraṭṭātiyil Ampala niṟaitta Aṟputakkūttar Inpar vāḻa Eḻuntaruḷuvataṟkut tirutterk koyil cempon mettuRead meyvittu.parutiraḷmuttiṉ payilvaṭam parappi niṟaimaṇimāḷikai neṭunterviti tiruvaḷarperāl cey
tucamaittaruḷi paimpoṟ kuvitta parikalamutalāṟ cempoṟ kaṟpakattoṭu paricciṉnamum Aḷavillā
taṉa Oḷipeṟa vamaittup pattāmāṇṭu cittiraittiṅka ḷattam peṟṟa Ātittavārattut tiruvaḷar patiyil tiraiyodaśi pakkattu Iṉnaṉa palavum Initu camaittaruḷit taṉ Orukuṭaikkiḻ taraṇimuḻutum taḻaippa ceḻiyar veñcuram puka ceralar kaṭal puka vaḻitaru ciṅkaṇa(r) rañci neñcalamara kaṅkar tiṟaiyiṭa kaṉnaṭar ventiṭa koṅka rotuṅkak koṅkaṇar cāya maṟṟetticai maṉnaru
n tantamak kara(ṇ)ṇen tirumāl ceppi Urimaiyi liṟaiñcit teriyar tilatam tiyākapatākai purikuḻal maṭappiṭi puṉitakuṇavaṉitai tiripuvaṉamuṭaiyāḷivaḷeṉa tiruvuḷḷat taruḷumuḻutuṭaiyāḷeṉa Uṭaniruppa neṭumālātattuRead ºlākattu.piriyāteṉṟum mātar maṭamayil pūtalat taruntati Araṇiya kaṟpil taraṇimuḻutumuṭaiyāḷivaḷeṉa tirumaṇimārvat taruḷuṭa(n) ṉiruppa cempoṉ virasiṁhāsa nattu tiripuThis inscription is built in.
Digital edition of SII 7.773 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
